## Task Link
- Linked issue: Closes #<issue-number>
- Task ID: TASK-XXX

## Scope Declaration
- Branch name follows: `codex/<task-id>-<short-slug>`
- This PR only implements one task issue
- Allowed files respected: Yes/No
- If No, explain approved re-scope:

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Required Checks
- [ ] `headless-tests`
- [ ] `lint`
- [ ] `smoke-scene`
- [ ] `task-specific-tests`

## Test Evidence
List exact commands run and summarize outcomes.

```bash
# example
gh run list --limit 5
```

## Verifier Section (Required)
- Verifier requested: Yes/No
- Verifier findings addressed: Yes/No
- Verifier approval link/comment:

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk level: low/medium/high
- Rollback plan:

## Documentation and ADR
- [ ] No interface/contract changes
- [ ] Updated docs
- [ ] Updated ADR (required for contract/rule changes)
